creator: tobez@tobez.org
text:
New version:

- libesmtp is now at 0.5;
- incorporate roam's suggestions to improve the port;
- add a little bit of docs.

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	libesmtp
#	libesmtp/files
#	libesmtp/files/patch-headers.c
#	libesmtp/files/patch-smtp-api.c
#	libesmtp/Makefile
#	libesmtp/pkg-plist
#	libesmtp/distinfo
#	libesmtp/pkg-descr
#	libesmtp/pkg-comment
#
echo c - libesmtp
mkdir -p libesmtp > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - libesmtp/files
mkdir -p libesmtp/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - libesmtp/files/patch-headers.c
sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/files/patch-headers.c << 'END-of-libesmtp/files/patch-headers.c'
X--- headers.c.orig	Wed Feb 21 23:07:41 2001
X+++ headers.c	Wed Feb 21 23:07:57 2001
X@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
X #include <stdarg.h>
X #include <string.h>
X #include <stdlib.h>
X+#include <time.h>
X 
X #include "libesmtp-private.h"
X #include "headers.h"
END-of-libesmtp/files/patch-headers.c
echo x - libesmtp/files/patch-smtp-api.c
sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/files/patch-smtp-api.c << 'END-of-libesmtp/files/patch-smtp-api.c'
X--- smtp-api.c.orig	Tue Mar  6 21:28:55 2001
X+++ smtp-api.c	Tue Mar  6 21:29:15 2001
X@@ -20,6 +20,8 @@
X  *  Foundation, Inc., 59 Temple Place, Suite 330, Boston, MA  02111-1307  USA
X  */
X 
X+#include <sys/types.h>
X+
X #include <stdarg.h>
X #include <string.h>
X #include <stdlib.h>
END-of-libesmtp/files/patch-smtp-api.c
echo x - libesmtp/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/Makefile << 'END-of-libesmtp/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:    libesmtp
X# Date created:         Sun Feb 21 2001
X# Whom:                 tobez@tobez.org
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	libesmtp
XPORTVERSION=	0.5
XCATEGORIES=	mail
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.stafford.uklinux.net/libesmtp/ \
X		http://www.tobez.org/download/port-mirrors/mail/libesmtp/
X
XMAINTAINER=	tobez@tobez.org
X
XUSE_LIBTOOL=	yes
XINSTALLS_SHLIB=	yes
X
Xpost-install:
X.ifndef(NOPORTDOCS)
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/examples/libesmtp
X	${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/doc/libesmtp
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/examples/* ${PREFIX}/share/examples/libesmtp
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/INSTALL ${PREFIX}/share/doc/libesmtp
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/Notes ${PREFIX}/share/doc/libesmtp
X	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README ${PREFIX}/share/doc/libesmtp
X.endif
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-libesmtp/Makefile
echo x - libesmtp/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/pkg-plist << 'END-of-libesmtp/pkg-plist'
Xinclude/libesmtp.h
Xlib/libesmtp.so.2
Xlib/libesmtp.so
Xlib/libesmtp.a
X%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/libesmtp/INSTALL
X%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/libesmtp/Notes
X%%PORTDOCS%%share/doc/libesmtp/README
X%%PORTDOCS%%share/examples/libesmtp/Makefile
X%%PORTDOCS%%share/examples/libesmtp/mail-file.c
X%%PORTDOCS%%share/examples/libesmtp/test-mail
X%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/examples/libesmtp
X%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm share/doc/libesmtp
END-of-libesmtp/pkg-plist
echo x - libesmtp/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/distinfo << 'END-of-libesmtp/distinfo'
XMD5 (libesmtp-0.5.tar.gz) = 6650c0cd5d088aa505b219d69ae160bf
END-of-libesmtp/distinfo
echo x - libesmtp/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/pkg-descr << 'END-of-libesmtp/pkg-descr'
XlibESMTP is a library to manage posting (or submission of) electronic
Xmail using SMTP to a preconfigured Mail Transport Agent (MTA) such as
XExim. It may be used as part of a Mail User Agent (MUA) or another
Xprogram that must be able to post electronic mail but where mail
Xfunctionality is not the program's primary purpose. libESMTP is not
Xintended to be used as part of a program that implements a Mail
XTransport Agent.
X
XlibESMTP is an attempt to provide a robust implementation of the SMTP
Xprotocol for use with mail clients. It is being developed as a reaction
Xto the experience of incomplete or buggy implementations of SMTP and
Xalso to help remove the need for the installation of MTAs on
Xworkstations which only need them to provide a sendmail command for a
Xmail client to post its mail.
X
XWWW: http://www.stafford.uklinux.net/libesmtp/
X
X- Anton
Xtobez@tobez.org
END-of-libesmtp/pkg-descr
echo x - libesmtp/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >libesmtp/pkg-comment << 'END-of-libesmtp/pkg-comment'
XlibESMTP - A Library for Posting Electronic Mail
END-of-libesmtp/pkg-comment
exit


-- 
May the tuna salad be with you.
